title: Paronychia gomerensis
taxonomy: Paronychia gomerensis is a species of flowering plant in the family Portulacaceae. It is a succulent plant native to the Canary Islands. The classification of Paronychia gomerensis places it within the genus Paronychia. This genus is part of the family Portulacaceae, which comprises various succulent plants and herbs. Further classification groups Paronychia gomerensis as a member of the order Caryophyllales.
